'''鈭歝h-th-ch-r''' ('''kachathcheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:albuminize|albuminize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:albuminize|albuminize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-th-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| kachathcheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichathcheroko|thichathcheroko]] || [[word:jichathcheroko|jichathcheroko]] || [[word:shichathcheroko|shichathcheroko]] || [[word:kichathcheroko|kichathcheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchathcheroko|thuthuchathcheroko]] || [[word:jujuchathcheroko|jujuchathcheroko]] || [[word:shushuchathcheroko|shushuchathcheroko]] || [[word:kukuchathcheroko|kukuchathcheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchathcheroko|thuchathcheroko]] || [[word:juchathcheroko|juchathcheroko]] || [[word:shuchathcheroko|shuchathcheroko]] || [[word:kuchathcheroko|kuchathcheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchathcheroko|thuchathcheroko]] || [[word:juchathcheroko|juchathcheroko]] || [[word:shuchathcheroko|shuchathcheroko]] || [[word:kuchathcheroko|kuchathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechathcheroko|thechathcheroko]] || [[word:jechathcheroko|jechathcheroko]] || [[word:shechathcheroko|shechathcheroko]] || [[word:kechathcheroko|kechathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochathcheroko|thothochathcheroko]] || [[word:jojochathcheroko|jojochathcheroko]] || [[word:shoshochathcheroko|shoshochathcheroko]] || [[word:kokochathcheroko|kokochathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochathcheroko|thochathcheroko]] || [[word:jochathcheroko|jochathcheroko]] || [[word:shochathcheroko|shochathcheroko]] || [[word:kochathcheroko|kochathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochathcheroko|thochathcheroko]] || [[word:jochathcheroko|jochathcheroko]] || [[word:shochathcheroko|shochathcheroko]] || [[word:kochathcheroko|kochathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chathcheroko|th忙chathcheroko]] || [[word:j忙chathcheroko|j忙chathcheroko]] || [[word:sh忙chathcheroko|sh忙chathcheroko]] || [[word:k忙chathcheroko|k忙chathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachathcheroko|thathachathcheroko]] || [[word:jajachathcheroko|jajachathcheroko]] || [[word:shashachathcheroko|shashachathcheroko]] || [[word:kakachathcheroko|kakachathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachathcheroko|thachathcheroko]] || [[word:jachathcheroko|jachathcheroko]] || [[word:shachathcheroko|shachathcheroko]] || [[word:kachathcheroko|kachathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachathcheroko|thachathcheroko]] || [[word:jachathcheroko|jachathcheroko]] || [[word:shachathcheroko|shachathcheroko]] || [[word:kachathcheroko|kachathcheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachathcherithi|shachathcherithi]] || [[word:shachathcheriji|shachathcheriji]] || [[word:shachathcherishi|shachathcherishi]] || [[word:shachathcheriki|shachathcheriki]]

|-

|-
